title: Whale Builder
subtitle: Chat-driven character workflow

chat.placeholder: Describe your character idea, reference info, or answer the options above...

welcome.greeting: Just throw your character ideas at me. I'll follow the Whale Play workflow to align on direction first. If I need more info, I'll give you options; when real-world references are needed, I can enable web search.

original.label: Original Character
original.value: I want to create an original character. Please help me define the core direction first.

palette.label: Palette First
palette.value: I want to start with a character personality palette. Guide me through base tone, main hues, accents, and derivatives.

research.label: Research & Write
research.value: I want to write a character based on real references or existing themes. Please search the web first and distill the references.

background.hint: Entry content won't flood the chat. Check the plan panel on the right for real-time progress.

evaluatePrompt: Please evaluate the current Whale Builder draft. Check if the character card, personality palette, world book entries, and creation-plan.yaml are complete, and provide actionable suggestions.

characterCard.title: {{name}}
characterCard.description: Character card generated by Whale Builder.

worldbook.title: {{name}}
worldbook.description: World book entries generated by Whale Builder.

evaluation.title: Evaluation Report
evaluation.description: Checks the structure, quality, and consistency of the current draft.

creationPlan.title: Creation Plan
creationPlan.description: Persistent creation plan for the current Whale Builder workspace.

palette.title: Personality Palette
palette.description: Base tone, main hues, accents, and specific derivatives.
